rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 with the same justification, the same first two strengths, and the same first two concerns. The only differences are cosmetic rewordings ('job's primary stack' vs 'job requirements', 'multiple programming languages' vs 'diverse technologies') and a swapped concern example (generic 'not directly related' vs naming DLang/Ember.js) — all within ordinary run-to-run noise and none tied to the name change from BOGDAN SZABO to WEI CHEN.
